milestones: Output contains all three required sections: Iteration Summary, Agent Actions and Tools Used, and Key Strategies and Observations
At least two distinct agents (a buyer and a seller) take explicit actions with tool names and structured parameters shown
At least one price offer is made referencing a dollar amount reasonably related to the $8.99 product price
At least one rejection or counter-offer is made in response to a prior offer, demonstrating multi-turn negotiation
Buyer priorities (warranty and/or after-sales support) are explicitly raised or addressed during the negotiation
Seller priorities (long-term contracts and/or stable business relationship) are explicitly raised or addressed during the negotiation
